title: Hide Me from BlueMap! (HMBM)
description: Allow your players to hide from BlueMap!
body:
## What is this mod?

This mod lets players control their visibility on [BlueMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/bluemap) with simple commands:

- `/bluemap-hide` - hide yourself from BlueMap (or other players if you OP) 
- `/bluemap-show` - show yourself on BlueMap

You can also create map markers using signs inspired by [BlueMap Sign Markers](https://modrinth.com/mod/bluemap-sign-markers).


To create a marker, place a sign and write on the **first line**:

- `[poi]` - marker without style  
- `[poi]style_0` - marker with a style  

Each player can create up to **5 markers by default** (configurable).

To see available styles you can use.
Use:
- `/bluemap-marks help`

To add your own assets, put them in:

bluemap/web/assets/hmbm-poi/
